# Project Gamma

Real-time processing system.

## Status

Active - Ongoing optimization

## Overview

Project Gamma handles real-time data processing for latency-sensitive operations. Led by 田中太郎 (Taro Tanaka) from the Tokyo office.

## Team

- **Tech Lead**: 田中太郎 (Taro Tanaka)
- **Design**: Diana Park

## Objectives

1. Sub-millisecond latency
2. 99.99% uptime
3. Global distribution

## Technical Stack

- Backend: C++, Rust
- Infrastructure: Custom bare-metal + AWS
- Messaging: Custom protocol

## Notes

This project requires specialized expertise in low-latency systems.
